description_long: This is a robust, rectangular counter with a utilitarian design, featuring a beige and gray color scheme with visible wear and scuff marks. The front side has a recessed workspace with a metallic surface and a raised section housing a digital display screen, which shows a green interface with a clover-like symbol and Japanese text. Three round indicator lights are positioned to the left of the display, and the counter's surface includes a grid of green-lit elements, suggesting a technological or interactive function. The sides of the counter are solid, with one side displaying a white geometric flower emblem and Japanese writing, while the rear panel is mostly plain with several handprints visible. The counter appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and composite materials, giving it a sturdy, industrial feel suitable for urban or public environments.
description: A sturdy, beige and gray counter with a digital display, indicator lights, and visible wear, featuring a metallic workspace and urban design details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed workspace, digital display with green interface, three indicator lights, and metallic surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the geometric flower emblem, Japanese writing, and the side profile of the display and workspace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain panel with several handprints and the angular structure of the counter.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid side panel and the angled housing of the display, with no visible emblems.
attribute_button_layout: three round buttons in a horizontal row
